meta.description: Single authoritative source for all AEXS style values. Covers investor browser deck (PitchDeck.jsx), investor PDF deck (build_deck.py), and non-pitch browser surfaces via theme.js compatibility layer.

resolution-notes.gold: ADR-001: #C8A84B — PitchDeck.jsx + build_deck.py consensus. theme.js was #C9A84C, now aligned.
resolution-notes.bg-divergence: PitchDeck.jsx uses #080C18, build_deck.py uses #07090F. bg = #080C18 (browser primary). bg-pdf = #07090F (PDF primary, preserved separately so PDF background is unchanged after migration).
resolution-notes.green-divergence: Rule 2: PitchDeck.jsx uses #22c55e (green-500), build_deck.py uses #10B981 (emerald-500). Both preserved. green = browser canonical; green-emerald = PDF canonical. build_deck.py GREEN maps to green-emerald.
resolution-notes.orange-divergence: Rule 2: PitchDeck.jsx uses #f97316 (orange-500), build_deck.py uses #F59E0B (amber-400). Both preserved. orange = browser; orange-amber = PDF.
resolution-notes.purple-divergence: Rule 2: PitchDeck.jsx uses #a855f7 (purple-500), build_deck.py uses #8B5CF6 (violet-500). Both preserved. purple-500 = browser canonical; purple-violet = PDF canonical. Key named purple-500 (not purple) to avoid collision with theme.js purple (#9B6CD9 — a different UI purple used by non-pitch components).
resolution-notes.key-naming-strategy: Keys matching theme.js key names are: gold, teal, muted, text, dim, dark. Their values either match theme.js exactly (teal, muted, text, dim, dark) or are aligned to canonical (gold). Presentation keys that would collide with different-valued theme.js keys use distinct names (blue-500 not blue; card-deck not card; border-deck not border) — ensuring verify-theme-sync checks only truly shared keys.

alignment.note: Used in footer_bar(), two_line_bar(), stat_strip(). Formula: baseline = bar_mid - font_size * 0.33. Accounts for Helvetica cap-height-to-font-size ratio so drawString baseline lands at optical center of its container bar.
